\tzpentry{ID4847}{Vector Potential Bound}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4847 introduces Vector Potential Bound as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$A_{ij} = \\begin{cases} 1 & \\text{if } \\|\\mathbf{p}_i - \\mathbf{p}_j\\| \\leq \\Delta_{\\text{lattice}} \\\\ 0 & \\text{otherwise} \\end{cases} \\quad \\text{subject to } \\text{rank}(\\mathbf{A}) = 153,600$$
